summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording of a legendary show with superb instrument separation and plenty of Phil
review: The UltraMatrix SBD mastered by Charlie Miller delivers an exceptionally clear, well‑balanced listening experience, highlighting every instrument and giving the bass especially strong presence. Reviewers hail the performance as a classic all‑timer, though no specific songs are singled out.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed 5‑star review praises both the show (legendary status) and the recording (crystal‑clear, excellent mix), leading to a near‑top rating with high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal clear instrument definition, strong separation, especially prominent Phil bass; no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as an all‑timer legendary show; overall flow praised though specific set details are not mentioned.

band_member_comments.Phil: Prominent and strong bass presence noted positively.
